channel.title: swiftlang/swift CHANGELOG.md
channel.description: The commit history of the CHANGELOG.md in the swiftlang/swift repository.

item.title: Update CHANGELOG.md - typo for 0371 vs 0471 The changelog appears to link ...
item.description:
Update CHANGELOG.md - typo for 0371 vs 0471
The changelog appears to link to the wrong SE.

item.title: [Changelog] Add changelog entry for forward declaration rule change
item.description: [Changelog] Add changelog entry for forward declaration rule change

item.title: AST: Allow anyAppleOS availability without an experimental feature. Resolv...
item.description:
AST: Allow anyAppleOS availability without an experimental feature.
Resolves rdar://170988964.

item.title: CHANGELOG: Add SE-0504 Task Cancellation Shields (#87251) Added SE-0504 Ta...
item.description:
CHANGELOG: Add SE-0504 Task Cancellation Shields (#87251)
Added SE-0504 Task Cancellation Shields to changelog.
---------
Co-authored-by: Jamie <2119834+jamieQ@users.noreply.github.com>

item.title: CHANGELOG: Explain that objc bridging is using Task.immediate (#86885)
